part6.passage:
Notice to All Staff:

The building's elevator will be out of service for maintenance on ___(1)___. This is necessary to ensure the continued safety and ___(2)___ of the equipment. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and appreciate your ___(3)___. The stairs located at the end of the hall will be open for use ___(4)___ the day.

Management

questions.question: Blank (1)
questions.explanation: Specific future date needed.

questions.question: Blank (2)
questions.explanation: Noun required after 'and'.

questions.question: Blank (3)
questions.explanation: Noun required as object of 'appreciate'.

questions.question: Blank (4)
questions.explanation: 'throughout' indicates duration.

part6.passage:
Dear Mr. Smith,

We are pleased to inform you that your application for the position has been ___(1)___. Our team was very impressed with your background. Please let us know ___(2)___ you are available for an interview next week. We look forward to ___(3)___ from you soon. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us ___(4)___ anytime.

Sincerely,
HR Dept

questions.question: Blank (1)
questions.explanation: Passive voice 'has been accepted'.

questions.question: Blank (2)
questions.explanation: 'when' refers to time availability.

questions.question: Blank (3)
questions.explanation: 'look forward to' + gerund.

questions.question: Blank (4)
questions.explanation: Idiomatic preposition 'at anytime'.

part7.passage:
To: All Employees
From: IT Support
Subject: Scheduled Network Outage

Please be advised that there will be a scheduled network outage this Saturday from 10:00 PM to 2:00 AM on Sunday. During this time, you will not be able to access the company intranet or email servers. This outage is necessary to upgrade our security systems. If you have urgent work that requires network access, please plan accordingly. We apologize for the inconvenience.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the memo?
options: To announce a new security system
To notify staff of network downtime
To apologize for a recent error
questions.explanation: The memo advises of a scheduled network outage.

questions.question: When will the outage begin?
questions.explanation: The memo states Saturday from 10:00 PM.

questions.question: What will employees be unable to do?
questions.explanation: They cannot access the intranet or email servers.

questions.question: Why is the outage happening?
questions.explanation: Necessary to upgrade our security systems.

part7.passage:
Grand Opening Special!

Come celebrate the opening of 'Bean & Leaf' café this Friday at 8:00 AM! The first 50 customers will receive a free travel mug and a complimentary pastry with any drink purchase. Enjoy live acoustic music from 6:00 PM to 8:00 PM. We offer a wide selection of organic coffees, artisan teas, and freshly baked goods. Located at 123 Main Street, next to the city library.

questions.question: What event is being advertised?
questions.explanation: Celebrate the opening of Bean & Leaf café.

questions.question: What will the first 50 customers receive?
options: A front-row seat for the music
questions.explanation: Receive a free travel mug and a complimentary pastry.

questions.question: When does the live music start?
questions.explanation: Live acoustic music from 6:00 PM.

questions.question: Where is the business located?
questions.explanation: Located at 123 Main Street.
